title: Units sold per product (including never sold)
prompt: List every product and the total units sold across all order items — including products that have never been ordered (show 0). Start from order_items and RIGHT JOIN to products. Columns: name, units. Order by units ascending, then name.

generic: RIGHT JOIN products p ON p.product_id = oi.product_id

hints: RIGHT JOIN keeps every product even when no order_items match.
Unmatched products get NULL for quantity — wrap the SUM in COALESCE(…, 0).
